summary: Energetic November‑1985 War Memorial show remembered fondly; recording source and audio quality not detailed
review: The reviewer recalls a high‑energy two‑night run at the War Memorial in early November 1985, noting the large crowd, front‑row positioning and dancing on seats. No specific comments about the soundboard or audience mix are provided, so the technical quality of this FLAC24 recording remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review with a 4‑star rating; praise is directed at the live atmosphere, but there is no information on recording quality to adjust the score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No mention of soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any audio issues; source and fidelity cannot be assessed from the review.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer highlights the excitement of a packed, general‑admission crowd and front‑row dancing, suggesting a lively, well‑received performance.
